admissions.testing_policy: SMU is fully test-optional; applicants who do not submit ACT or SAT scores are evaluated on other factors including grades, résumé, essays, and recommendation letters.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

evidence.source_excerpt: SMU’s strength lies in fusing teaching and research into breakthrough academic experiences. This balance is rare among national institutions, yet fitting for a university like SMU that values balance and breadth in education. With more than 100 majors and 85 minors to choose from, as well as double and triple major opportunities and accelerated degree programs, you can go as far as you want and as quickly, too.

evidence.claim: You’ll be transformed by the knowledge and experiences gained through the Embrey Human Rights Program, whose mission is to educate students and other members of the global community to understand, promote and defend human rights as responsible citizens of the world. You’ll have many opportunities to learn, travel and act for human rights as a student at SMU, the first university in the South, and only the fifth in the country, to offer an undergraduate major in human rights.
